creator: bertram.scharpf@gmail.com
text:
Sorry, you did not understand the problem at all. The question is not
wether one
chooses Athena or GTK+ or whatever. The problem ist, that when you say

  # make show-options
  ... [lots of options]

the options will be show, but they will be completely ignored when you say
one of

  # make showconfig
  # make config
  ===> No options to configure

There is not one piece of documentation helping with this solution:

  # make -DWITH_OPTIONS showconfig
  # make -DWITH_OPTIONS config

I cannot understand why you close the bug report without fixing this really
annoying
problem. I cannot understand why you write something about X11 and Athena
after
I detected and posted the real problem.

Here's another discussion coming to the same solution that you refuse to
see:
<http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=40610>.
